title: Aristide Benoist — Interactive developer, designer, art director
description: T662 / T74 cycle 3: structural mirror of aristidebenoist.com — a school-of-motion-listed designer portfolio with heavy WebGL + cursor-coupled animation. Third animated-reference rebuild. Tests the animation-gap dedup theory across a 3rd vertical (interaction-design vs marcodeluca's portfolio-typography vs sphericalwaves' 3D-audio).

sections.title: Crafting digital matter — the interactive layer between idea and screen
sections.lede: Five years building interactive flagship sites with studios and direct-to-brand. I write the WebGL, the shader code, the cursor logic, and the bones of the interface — whatever the project needs to feel inevitable.

sections.title: GAP-T662-7 (NEW vertical) — CursorCoupledScene with kinetic poster fallback
body: The original landing is dominated by a custom cursor + a hero shader that warps in response to pointer position. Every section's heading is a per-character reveal that re-fires when the user scrolls back. None of the existing CmsSection variants model this.

Cross-rebuild dedup-table update for animated category: marcodeluca needed KineticTitle + HoverVideo + ScrollReveal; sphericalwaves needed Canvas3D; aristidebenoist needs CursorCoupledScene + KineticTitle (3rd surface) + ScrollReveal (3rd surface). KineticTitle is now 2-of-3 animated surfaces; ScrollReveal is 2-of-3. Both bump to MED priority. CursorCoupledScene + Canvas3D remain 1-of-3 each — vertical-specific.

Proposed shape: CursorCoupledScene { scene_module: String, fallback_poster: CmsImage, intensity: f32 (0..=1) }. The fallback_poster is required: sites without JS / on low-end devices / a11y-prefers-reduced-motion get a static hero with the same content + visual weight. Forge's no-JS principle means the poster IS the rendered baseline; the scene is a progressive-enhancement layer.

Defence-in-depth: the scene module must be served from same-origin only (CSP + SRI both apply). Cross-origin scene modules are rejected at the Forge picker layer — surfacing the security boundary explicitly per AVP-2 doctrine.

items.title: Atelier OI — anniversary site

items.title: Lumis — generative artist portfolio
items.host_sub: Site build · GLSL shader for live audio reactive cover · 2023

sections.title: GAP-T662-8 (re-surface) — ScrollRevealText now 2-of-3 animated
body: Every heading + paragraph reveals on scroll — a per-character mask that fires when the section enters the viewport (and re-fires if you scroll back up + down again). marcodeluca had this. sphericalwaves had this. aristidebenoist also has it. THREE surfaces now — bump to PRIORITY 1 in the T70 animated backlog.
Proposed shape: ScrollRevealText { text: Markdown, stagger_ms: u16, easing: TimingCurve, replay_on_re_enter: bool }. Falls back to static text when JS is disabled or prefers-reduced-motion is set.

items.value: Voronoi cell distortion driven by audio FFT amplitude. WebGL, 2024.
Procedural fluid simulation on a torus. WebGL + GLSL fragment shader.
Pointer-spring inertia for navigation links; tactile but framerate-light.
Scroll-position-keyed colour-grade — sections shift through a palette curve.

sections.title: Background
body: Began full-time in 2019, split between studio engagements (Atelier OI, Wandelaar) and direct client builds. Comfortable across the full interactive stack: shaders + scene composition (Three.js, OGL, raw WebGL), interaction logic (custom cursor, scroll coupling), state choreography, and the CMS-side glue that ships the site reliably across browsers + locales.
Speak French and English. Based in Geneva. Travel for kickoffs + handoffs.

sections.body: The site that feels effortless usually had a developer sweating shader compile times in a hotel room at 2am the week before launch.

sections.title: GAP-T662-9 (re-surface) — Quote now 5-of-5 universal
body: Personal-quote pattern surfaces here too. The marketing rebuilds (Stripe + Linear + Vercel + NYT) all hit it; this animated portfolio rebuild also hits it. Quote variant is now 5-of-5 — TRULY universal across both verticals AND both content vs marketing categories. T660 P2 implementation continues to pay back. (Forge T70 backlog: Quote stays LOCKED.)

items.value: Same week for client briefs; same day for in-flight project bugs.

sections.text: T662 cycle 3 (3rd animated rebuild) dedup-table update: ScrollRevealText bumps to PRIORITY 1 (3-of-3 surfaces); KineticTitle bumps to PRIORITY 2 (2-of-3); CursorCoupledScene + Canvas3D + HoverVideo each remain 1-of-3 vertical-specific. Quote variant is now 5-of-5 universal across BOTH marketing AND animated rebuilds — LOCKED as a baseline primitive.
